subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the Desired One proclaimeth and announceth unto humanity His irrevocable Decree and His sealed Wine. Blessed are they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینادی المقصود و یبشر الناس بامره المحتوم و رحیقه المختوم طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @presence of; reunion with God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
